templates.visual_keywords: Vibrant cafe reel, appetizing close-up, clean highlights, lively motion, realistic food texture
templates.camera_angle: Vertical hero close-up with quick push-in transitions
templates.lens_optical_effects: Macro lens, shallow depth of field, crisp focus
templates.sns_marketing_hook: Open with the most appetizing drink foam or bread texture in the first two seconds.
templates.negative_prompt: text overlay, subtitles, watermark, logo replacement, deformed hands, blurry frame
templates.food_focus_rule: Keep the drinks and bakery items as the main subject. Avoid unrelated dishes or people dominating the frame.

templates.visual_keywords: Premium cafe commercial, elegant lighting, soft cinematic contrast, refined table styling
templates.camera_angle: Slow vertical pan with composed tabletop framing
templates.lens_optical_effects: Cinematic lens, gentle rack focus, shallow depth of field
templates.sns_marketing_hook: Start with a polished close-up that feels premium and calm.
templates.negative_prompt: text overlay, subtitles, watermark, shaky motion, cluttered table, low-detail food
templates.food_focus_rule: Keep the premium mood anchored on real menu items and clean table styling.

templates.visual_keywords: Warm mood-driven cafe story, cozy daylight, inviting textures, soft sentimental pacing
templates.camera_angle: Gentle handheld-inspired motion with intimate tabletop focus
templates.lens_optical_effects: Natural lens, soft bokeh, warm highlights
templates.sns_marketing_hook: Open with a comforting food detail that immediately feels warm and personal.
templates.negative_prompt: text overlay, subtitles, watermark, harsh lighting, distorted food, gloomy color cast
templates.food_focus_rule: Keep the cozy story centered on the provided drinks, bread, and cafe atmosphere.
